# daytona_sandbox_query (Data Source)

Queries Daytona sandboxes with server-side filtering, sorting, and cursor pagination.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_query" "running_agents" {
  name_prefix = "agent"
  states      = ["started"]
  sort        = "createdAt"
  order       = "desc"
  limit       = 50
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `created_at_after` (String) Include sandboxes created after this RFC3339 timestamp.
- `created_at_before` (String) Include sandboxes created before this RFC3339 timestamp.
- `cursor` (String) Pagination cursor from a previous response.
- `id_prefix` (String) Case-insensitive sandbox ID prefix filter.
- `include_errored_deleted` (Boolean) Whether results with errored state and deleted desired state should be included.
- `is_public` (Boolean) Filter by sandbox public preview status.
- `is_recoverable` (Boolean) Filter by sandbox recoverable status.
- `labels_json` (String) JSON object string of labels to filter by.
- `last_event_after` (String) Include sandboxes with a last event after this RFC3339 timestamp.
- `last_event_before` (String) Include sandboxes with a last event before this RFC3339 timestamp.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of sandboxes to return. Daytona defaults to 100.
- `max_cpu` (Number) Maximum CPU cores.
- `max_disk_gib` (Number) Maximum disk in GiB.
- `max_memory_gib` (Number) Maximum memory in GiB.
- `min_cpu` (Number) Minimum CPU cores.
- `min_disk_gib` (Number) Minimum disk in GiB.
- `min_memory_gib` (Number) Minimum memory in GiB.
- `name_prefix` (String) Case-insensitive sandbox name prefix filter.
- `order` (String) Sort direction. Supported values: `asc`, `desc`.
- `region_ids` (List of String) Region IDs to include.
- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.
- `sandbox_classes` (List of String) Sandbox classes to include.
- `snapshots` (List of String) Snapshot names or IDs to include.
- `sort` (String) Sort field. Supported values: `name`, `cpu`, `memoryGib`, `diskGib`, `lastActivityAt`, `createdAt`.
- `states` (List of String) Sandbox states to include.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned Daytona sandboxes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `next_cursor` (String) Cursor for the next page of results, when available.

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `auto_archive_interval` (Number) Auto-archive interval in minutes.
- `auto_delete_interval` (Number) Auto-delete interval in minutes.
- `auto_stop_interval` (Number) Auto-stop interval in minutes.
- `backup_state` (String) Sandbox backup state, when available.
- `cpu` (Number) CPU cores allocated to the sandbox.
- `created_at` (String) Sandbox creation timestamp.
- `daemon_version` (String) Sandbox daemon version, when available.
- `desired_state` (String) Desired sandbox state.
- `disk` (Number) Disk allocated to the sandbox in GiB.
- `error_reason` (String) Sandbox error reason, when available.
- `gpu` (Number) GPU units allocated to the sandbox.
- `gpu_type` (String) GPU type assigned to the sandbox, when available.
- `id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels for the sandbox.
- `last_activity_at` (String) Sandbox last activity timestamp, when available.
- `memory` (Number) Memory allocated to the sandbox in GiB.
- `name` (String) Sandbox name.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID that owns the sandbox.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether HTTP previews are publicly accessible.
- `recoverable` (Boolean) Whether the sandbox can be recovered from its current error state.
- `runner_id` (String) Runner ID hosting the sandbox, when assigned.
- `sandbox_class` (String) Sandbox class.
- `snapshot` (String) Snapshot ID or name used to create the sandbox.
- `state` (String) Current sandbox state.
- `target` (String) Target region where the sandbox is created.
- `toolbox_proxy_url` (String) Toolbox proxy URL for the sandbox.
- `updated_at` (String) Sandbox update timestamp.
- `user` (String) User associated with the sandbox project.
